view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case confirms that a unique Zoom meeting link is automatically generated for each appointment, which is a direct fulfillment of the requirement for security. The system creates a unique link upon booking confirmation, as detailed in the use case, and this link is included in the confirmation email and added to both the therapist's and client's calendars. This supports the requirement of having a unique link per meeting, thus validating the exploratory step's objective.
